modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty replying to emails using @usd.edu address in Outlook.

full_description_text: 
The user, a student employee, is experiencing challenges when attempting to respond to emails that were originally sent to their @coyotes.usd.edu address. They specifically want to know how to ensure their replies are sent from their official @usd.edu email address instead. This situation arose during their work hours, and they are seeking clarity on the process to maintain proper email correspondence. The user mentioned that they are using the new version of Outlook, which may have some different features compared to previous iterations.
